title: Just Move:Clean City Messy Battle (Steam) Giveaway
description: Just Move: Clean City Messy Battle is free on Steam until March 4! Just Move: Clean City Messy Battle is a 2D top-down shooter where your character will automatically shoot at enemies when they’re within range.
instructions:
1. Click the button to visit the giveaway page.
2. Download this game directly via Steam before the offer expires.
3. That´s it! Have fun!

title: World Crafter TD (Steam) Giveaway
description: World Crafter TD is currently free on Steam until March 5, so now’s the perfect time to add it to your library. Blending survival crafting with classic tower defense mechanics, World Crafter TD lets you gather resources, craft gear, build up your base, set up turrets, and jump into the action with guns blazing.
instructions:
1. Click the button to visit the giveaway page.
2. Download this game directly via Steam before the offer expires.
3. That´s it! Have fun!

title: SUPER CIRCUIT BREAKERS - PAYNE
description: Grab this DLC for FREE until the end of May! Please note the base game is required (free to play) to play this DLC content.
instructions:

2. Install the DLC before the offer expires.

title: DAVE THE DIVER - Godzilla Content Pack (Steam) Giveaway
description: Grab your free Godzilla DLC for DAVE THE DIVER on Steam! DAVE THE DIVER - Godzilla Content Pack is a time-limited free DLC, only available until December 31, 2026. Please note the base game DAVE THE DIVER is required to enjoy this content.
instructions:
1. Click the "Get Loot" button to visit the giveaway page.
2. Download this DLC directly via Steam before the offer expires.
3. Don´t forget to install the base game.

title: Boxes: Lost Fragments (Epic Games) Giveaway
description:
Epic Games Store is back with another weekly giveaway. This time, you can score Boxes: Lost Fragments for free, a cool 3D puzzle game where you must solve a series of puzzle boxes designed for an unknown purpose.

*Boxes: Lost Fragments (Mobile version) is also available via Epic Games Store App for iPhone, iPad, and Android.
instructions:
1. Click the button to visit the giveaway page.
2. Log in to your Epic Games Store account.
3. Click the button to add the game to your library
platforms: PC, Android, iOS, Epic Games Store
